## Legal-Match Safety Checklist (required when touching legal-match scope)
- [ ] One primary action per screen in affected flows
- [ ] Top-3-first presentation preserved (no overload defaults)
- [ ] Copy uses plain language and short sentences
- [ ] No exclamation points in critical flow copy
- [ ] No promises/guarantees/legal bravado language
- [ ] Consent checks enforced before draft/submission actions
- [ ] Human approval required before external submission
- [ ] Source provenance attached to displayed attorney data
- [ ] Audit logs emitted for create/update/review/submit actions
- [ ] Blocked/error states are calm and non-punitive

## Validation
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual QA performed for affected flow
- [ ] API contract updated if request/response changed
- [ ] Migration reviewed for constraints/indexes (if applicable)

## Risk Notes
- User safety or cognitive-load risk:
- Legal/compliance risk:
- Rollback plan:
